name: Root Calculator
desc: Root Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Calculate square and nth roots. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate sqrt(144) and cube root of 27.

range_hints.numero: Must be non-negative for even indices; typical: 1-10,000

result_context: The result ({result}) is the number that, when raised to the power of index, equals the original number.
steps: {'step': 1, 'description': 'Identify number (125) and index (3 for cube root)'}
mistakes: Trying to find even roots (square, 4th) of negative numbers in current domain
Confusing root index with the result value
Not recognizing that square root is index 2 (default)
